//: Cursor hooks for agora triggering. Place at <workspace>/.cursor/hooks.json.
//how: The `stop` hook fires when this tab finishes a turn. It long-polls the
//how2: agora inbox; when a message arrives it returns a followup_message that
//how3: re-prompts THIS tab to handle it — a local 'attache' that keeps the agent
//how4: in a self-sustaining loop with no human relay. loop_limit null = unbounded.
